mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(BoardNo) FROM HierarchicalBoard WHERE BoardNo > 0
AND boardNo > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HierarchicalBoard (BoardNo, BoardTitle, UserId, BoardContent, BoardDate, BoardGroupNo, BoardUpperNo, BoardIndent) VALUES(Board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{BoardTitle}, #{UserId}, #{BoardContent}, sysdate, Board_seq.NEXTVAL, 0, 0)

insert into HierarchicalBoard (BoardNo, BoardTitle, UserId, BoardContent, BoardDate, BoardGroupNo, BoardUpperNo, BoardIndent) values(Board_seq.NEXTVAL, #{BoardTitle}, #{UserId}, #{BoardContent}, sysdate, #{BoardGroupNo}, #{BoardNo}, #{BoardIndent})
